articles.title: Alsobrooks says Clarity Act needs ethics deal before Senate vote
articles.description: The Maryland Democrat says bipartisan crypto legislation is close, but ethics and illicit finance concerns remain unresolved.

articles.title: XRP falls toward $1.10 as liquidation-driven selloff pushes token to multi-month lows
articles.description: XRP lost another 5% after a high-volume breakdown overwhelmed support near $1.20, leaving traders focused on whether the latest washout marks capitulation or the start of a deeper slide.

articles.title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
articles.description: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"

articles.title: Visa tests private stablecoin settlement with Brale, Canton
articles.description: Visa is testing private stablecoin settlement on Canton with Brale, exploring whether institutions can use blockchain without exposing sensitive transaction data.

articles.title: NASA briefly sheltered space station astronauts in SpaceX’s Dragon due to leaks
articles.description: The space agency said Roscosmos discovered new leaks in the Russian service module.

articles.title: NSA said to be readying Anthropic’s Mythos for use in cyber operations
articles.description: The U.S. eavesdropping agency is reportedly preparing Anthropic's Mythos for use in cyberattacks, despite a federal ban on using the AI model maker.

articles.title: Zcash weighs new shielded pool after counterfeiting flaw
articles.description: Zcash developers are weighing a new shielded pool and turnstile accounting after the Orchard bug raised supply verification questions.

articles.description: The Australian data center operator plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India.

articles.title: Bitcoin needs one more thing to happen to spark BTC price 'rally:' Analysis
articles.description: Bitcoin whales flipped to support a BTC price rebound, but analysis warned that the Coinbase and Kimchi Premium still needed to return.

articles.title: Bearish zcash bets hit record high as privacy token's price crashes
articles.description: Liquidations were small relative to the size of the decline, pointing to spot selling rather than a leverage cascade, while open interest in ZEC futures climbed to a record high in token terms as traders crowded into the slide from the short side.

articles.title: House GOP eyes summer vote on prediction market restrictions for lawmakers
articles.description: House Republicans plan a summer vote on a congressional stock trading ban and new restrictions on lawmakers’ prediction market activity.

articles.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
articles.description: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.

articles.title: How low can Bitcoin price go if $60K support fails?

articles.title: Arthur Hayes dumps zcash holdings after Orchard Pool vulnerability revealed
